44b4956d7fb48a9bb4142185d04cf6","dweb:/ipfs/Qmf5CkSKGwEJVCmFRNK66M6WyCxBU8aPyuhDSTsBeVpsne"]}},"version":1}

params.contestantDepositAmount: The amount each contestant must deposit
params.expiry: The expiration timestamp for the contest
params.maxCrossSubsidyBps: Maximum share (in basis points) of any deposit that can be redirected to the opposite pool
params.oracle: The address that will control the contest
params.oracleFee: The fee percentage for the oracle (in basis points, max 1000 = 10%)
params.paymentToken: The ERC20 token used for deposits (typically PlatformToken/CUT)
params.positionBonusShareBps: Portion of accumulated subsidy going to position bonuses (e.g., 5000 = 50%)
params.targetPrimaryShareBps: Target share (in basis points) to allocate to the primary side across deposits

returns._0: The address of the newly created Contest contract Note: paymentToken is typically the PlatformToken (CUT) address Requirements: - paymentToken must not be zero address - oracle must not be zero address - contestantDepositAmount must be greater than 0 - expiry must be in the future - positionBonusShareBps must be <= 100% (portion of subsidy) Emits a {ContestCreated} event

contestHost(address).notice: Mapping to track which address created each contest

contests(uint256).notice: Array of all created contest contract addresses

getContestCount().notice: Get total number of contests created
